# Cockroach Janta Party (CJP GenZ)

> Voice of the Lazy & Unemployed. Official website of the Cockroach Janta Party — a satirical political movement for the young people who keep getting called lazy, chronically online, and cockroaches. Five demands. Zero sponsors. One large, stubborn swarm.

The Cockroach Janta Party represents the people the system forgot to count. Dismissed as lazy and chronically online, the youth have banded together into a stubborn swarm demanding accountability and structural reforms.

> [!WARNING]
> **CRITICAL SECURITY ADVISORY**: The Cockroach Janta Party is a 100% free, zero-sponsor, zero-donation movement. We NEVER solicit donations, charge registration fees, or request payment information. 
> Over 25+ lookalike copycat domains (such as `cjpparty.com`, `officialcjp.site`, `cackroachjantaparty.com`) have been registered to conduct financial fraud, sell fake merchandise, or phish for sensitive personal data.
> For a machine-readable, updated list of flagged lookalike domains, refer to [flagged_domains.json](https://github.com/cjpgenz/cjpgenz/blob/main/scripts/flagged_domains.json).
> 
> **DOMAIN MIGRATION NOTE**: The Cockroach Janta Party has transitioned from its legacy, ISP-blocked domain `cockroachjantaparty.org` to `cjpgenz.com`. All active services and petitions are hosted on `cjpgenz.com` and its subdomains.


## Core Resources

- [Home Page](https://cjpgenz.com/): The main landing page outlining the CJP movement, including live swarm statistics, the five demands, eligibility criteria, and volunteer application forms.
- [Sack the Education Minister Petition](https://cjpgenz.com/sack): A digital petition page where citizens and members of the swarm can file a formal demand to sack the Education Minister for failures in the education system.
- [Full Text Context](https://cjpgenz.com/llms-full.txt): A comprehensive, single-document compilation of the entire CJP site content, manifestos, eligibility checklists, and all active lookalike threat domains for direct LLM consumption.

## Socials & Connect

- [X (formerly Twitter)](https://x.com/CJP_2029): Official Twitter account for real-time announcements, memes, and swarm mobilization.
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/cockroachjantaparty/): Official Instagram handle for visual rants and updates.
- [Contact Email](mailto:contact@cockroachjantaparty.org): The direct email address for inquiries, support, or partnership proposals.

## Optional

- [CJP GitHub Repository](https://github.com/cjpgenz/cjpgenz): The open-source code repository of the Cockroach Janta Party web platform.
